title: ~2016
content:
~2016

video1, Pic 6,7,8, Style 3.C
a triptych cubist video study for nonfiction workshop;
a journey from then to now, ny to fa,
iphone clips from the beginning of my phone until then;
~2017
https://youtu.be/PHP7mOJT60I?si=nXN_GsW-jsL38P6b

but i fell out of love (and gay [which my whole life i was picked on for my feminine nature, causing a self proved , hey, i need to date a girl and a pretty one because fuck them; this turned into a survival mechanic, after the six months, and since she came in one year after me into a 3 year program, i didn't want to go to my paternal family in WPB <Wellington actually (because white and the foreclosure was cheap)> or my maternal family in SI, wanted to stay in my artist grown up and adult circle, and i thoought i did love her and was just my normal and sad depressed fat self, i kept the relationship in tact for 4 years, sex with 3 men in one night the day before christmas eve (alone as she was in Tallahassee with a family who didn't appreciate my italian measure and meatball welcome gift on our first meet bc i cooked it at her house and was a child of divorce and a new yorker (named Madison Garber and brother Jackson bc that's where they were born respectively, mom a college professor for health and dad a minor league baseball coach) ]after seeing call my by your name and telling myself a lie no longer, at the end introducing secret cocaine and heroin addictions to the r
context: From document: i've been generating creative work since i was around 12 years old… — chunk 6 (chunk 6/13)
